netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Proxy edge function that forwards POST requests to DeepSeek's chat completions API, supporting optional streaming and handling authentication via environment variable.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to a Railway-hosted backend service, dynamically routing to endpoint suffixes and forwarding an auth token from environment.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Proxy edge function that accepts a search query and count, forwards to Firecrawl's search endpoint, and returns transformed results with title, URL, and snippet.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Simple edge function that returns a GitHub personal access token from environment variables, with CORS headers, for use by client-side apps.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Proxy edge function that forwards POST requests to LangSearch's web search API, passing the request body and authenticating with an environment variable.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to OpenRouter's chat completions API, handling authentication via environment variable, streaming responses (defaulting to SSE), and returning JSON errors for bad responses or server misconfiguration.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: This script injects a small JavaScript snippet into index.html during Netlify deploy-preview builds to hide the login gate and show the main app content.

preferences.json.summary: This JSON file stores editable preferences for a self-improving bot, including custom prompts, planning rules, decomposition threshold, code style, lint before commit, and review strictness.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: This React component implements a chat interface with state management for messages, settings (theme, fontSize, compact, sidebar), live run state, error log, and token budget, using external stores and local storage for persistence.

src/components/SimpleChat/ChatPane.js.summary: This React component renders the chat message area with styled user and agent messages, adapting to mobile width, compact mode, and light/dark theme using the settings prop.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Defines a header component that displays a menu toggle button, the application title 'Self-Recursive Bot', and the current repository name, with styles adapting to theme and screen width.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: Provides an input bar with a text field and send button, adjusting layout and styling based on mobile view and theme, and supports pressing Enter to send.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageContent.summary: Renders message content with support for code blocks and <thinking> tags, applying font size and color based on user role and theme.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: Renders a scrollable list of chat messages, styling user and agent messages differently and auto-scrolling to the latest message using a ref.

src/components/SimpleChat/RunCard.js.summary: Displays the current run phase with a color-coded badge and icon, supports a compact inline view, and auto-scrolls the log area to the latest entry.

src/components/SimpleChat/Sidebar.js.summary: A React sidebar component that manages display settings like theme, width, and sections with styled inputs and buttons, and applies a light theme to the root element.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: A React TaskList component that displays a scrollable list of tasks with colored status labels and titles, adapting to mobile widths.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: A React Toaster component that renders a fixed-position toast notification with a colored border based on the toast type.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: The SelfImprover class orchestrates a self-improvement agent that uses GitHub, an LLM provider, task queue, memory, and orchestration phases to autonomously improve a repository.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory accumulates file summaries and notes during an agentic run and builds a compact context string for the LLM prompt.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 5, extracting 5-10 keywords and a short summary per file using LLM, and committing the resulting keywords.json with robust JSON extraction and retry.

src/core/execution/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Executes a single task using a read-before-write loop by delegating prompt building, edit application, quality checks, and commit verification to focused modules.

src/core/execution/commitVerifier.js.summary: Reads a committed file to verify its SHA matches the expected SHA, logging a warning on mismatch.

src/core/execution/promptBuilder.js.summary: Builds the LLM prompt for the agentic executor using ContextBuilder for smart file selection and injects conversation memory, producing SEARCH/REPLACE blocks for edits.

src/core/execution/qualityGate.js.summary: Runs lint and syntax checks before commit, retrying up to 2 times with LLM-generated fixes using SEARCH/REPLACE blocks.

src/core/execution/searchReplaceHandler..summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE or legacy update_editor blocks to build a fileMap ready for commit, handling retries on match failures.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files from keyword index matching user goal words, falling back to filename scan if no index exists.

src/core/goalVerifier.js.summary: Compares the feature-branch diff against the original goal using an LLM to determine if the goal is achieved.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides best-match functionality using exact, prefix, and Levenshtein fuzzy matching.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Ensures a manifest.json is loaded from the repo or built from source files using ManifestBuilder.

src/core/manifestUpdater.js.summary: Incrementally updates manifest.json after code changes by re-parsing exports/imports of modified files using static regex and recomputing importedBy for all files.

src/core/orchestration/clarificationQueu.summary: Replaces window.prompt() with a state-machine that saves questions to ConversationMemory, returns a Promise resolved when user sends answers, and routes replies as answers via a callback.

src/core/orchestration/cycleExecutor.js.summary: Runs the execute-and-review loop for self-improvement tasks, handling up to 3 cycles of execution and review with persistent memory save/load, and returns whether all passed and cycle count.

src/core/orchestration/pauseController.j.summary: Simple pause flag manager with requestPause, checkPause, and resetPause functions.

src/core/orchestration/postRunActions.js.summary: Handles everything after review passes: manifest update, regression detection, goal verification, PR creation, and smoke test, using GitHub service and other modules.

src/core/orchestration/runSetup.js.summary: runSetup handles pre-planning setup including conversation memory, error context enrichment, loading preferences, and creating a feature branch.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: parallelExec runs pending tasks concurrently with file-based conflict avoidance using a locked files set.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: persistentMemory provides functionality to persist and restore working memory and run summaries to the repository using GitHub service.

src/core/planner.js.summary: planner creates a structured plan using LLM by providing relevant file context and parsing the JSON response to initialize a task queue.

src/core/planning/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner explores the codebase by iteratively deciding which files to read via LLM, building a working memory of file summaries to inform the plan.

src/core/planning/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Coordinates multi-agent planning by grouping candidate files by directory, running exploration agents in parallel, and merging summaries into a single plan.

src/core/planning/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners by decomposing complex goals into sub-goals using an LLM decision and decomposition, then creates a hierarchical plan with tasks.

src/core/planning/plannerFactory.js.summary: Selects the appropriate planner based on discovery cache size, using coordinated planner for large caches or agentic planner for small, then applies hierarchical planner.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a pull request on GitHub by calling the GitHub service with the repository, branch, and goal excerpt as title.

src/core/regressionDetector.js.summary: Detects regressions by finding files that import changed files and verifying exported symbols still exist using LLM.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Compares original and committed files for tasks, enforces goal alignment, and marks tasks as passed or failed based on before/after comparison.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Initializes and manages a task queue with status tracking (TODO, DONE, FAILED) and provides functions to retrieve pending or done tasks and update task status.

src/core/taskQueueUtils.js.summary: Provides a topological sort function for tasks based on dependencies.

src/main.js.summary: Sets up services like GitHub, LLM, ExecutorAPI, and creates a SelfImprover instance for code improvement, using React state stores.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Loads and saves a preferences.json file from the repository with default settings for clarification, planning, execution, and review.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Stores structured context per repo+branch in localStorage with goal, phase, decisions, lastAction, openQuestions, failedAttempts, and lastUpdated.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses error stack traces and converts them into structured file references that the planner can inject.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: All calls go through the Netlify edge proxy; calls lint/syntax endpoints and fails open on network errors.

src/services/github.js.summary: Provides static methods to fetch file tree, load file content, and commit multiple files using GitHub API.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Single point to call language models through Netlify edge proxies with timeout, retries, and fast-model override.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: Exports SmokeTest class with static methods to poll a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly, constructing the preview URL from PR number and site name, and returning success or failure.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: Creates a zustand store with persistence to manage AI provider selection, model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort, defaulting to deepseek v4 flash.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: Creates a zustand store with persistence to manage workspace settings including current repository, branch, GitHub token, and whether to remember keys.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: Parses AI replies to extract structured actions like legacy update_editor blocks, Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks, and read file requests, returning the modified reply with placeholders and the extracted actions.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: Exports ContextBuilder class to build a prompt context string by selecting target and related files from a manifest, respecting a token budget, and returning ordered list of paths.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph from JavaScript files by parsing ES module imports/exports and creating a map with exports, imports, and importedBy arrays.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Tests code in a sandboxed iframe with predefined module imports and a timeout, evaluating the code and running a health check on a SelfImprover instance.

src/utils/searchReplace.js.summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE blocks to file content using a matching cascade (exact then whitespace-flexible) and returns detailed errors for the LLM to fix.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Removes JavaScript/CSS comments and blank lines to reduce prompt size using regular expressions.
